Blog About 中文

CalcKit

32 free tools to help entrepreneurs and business owners build, launch, and grow. No signup, no fees.

Free No Login Instant
AdSense — home hero

A. SaaS Metrics

Calculate MRR, burn rate, churn, revenue projections, break-even, and market sizing.

5 tools

Burn Rate Calculator

Analyze your monthly cash flow: break down costs by category, calculate runway, and see how cost-cutting extends your survival time.

Churn Rate Calculator

Analyze customer churn: monthly and annual rates, revenue impact, customer lifetime, and how reducing churn saves you money.

Market Size Estimator

Bottom-up market sizing: enter your target customers, pricing, and growth rate to estimate TAM, revenue potential, and what it takes to reach $100K.

MRR Calculator

Track your MRR health: new vs churned vs expansion revenue, monthly growth rate, and time to reach key milestones.

SaaS Financial Forecaster

The complete SaaS financial health dashboard: net-growth projections, runway, breakeven, burn metrics, LTV, sensitivity analysis, and what-if scenarios.

B. AI Cost Tools

Estimate OpenAI, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini API costs, GPU pricing, AI training, and image generation costs.

8 tools

OpenAI Token Calculator

Estimate OpenAI API costs based on model, token usage, and request volume.

Claude API Cost Calculator

Calculate Claude API costs for Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku models.

DeepSeek API Cost Calculator

Calculate DeepSeek API costs and compare savings vs OpenAI.

Gemini API Cost Calculator

Calculate Google Gemini API costs for 2.0 Flash, 1.5 Pro, and 1.5 Flash models.

AI Image Generation Cost Calculator

Estimate costs for AI image generation across DALL-E 3, Midjourney, and Stable Diffusion.

AI Training Cost Estimator

Estimate the cost of training AI models from 7B to 180B parameters.

GPU Cloud Cost Calculator

Compare GPU rental costs across AWS, GCP, Lambda Labs, and RunPod.

AI API Cost Comparison

Compare AI API costs across GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, and DeepSeek side by side.

C. Valuation & Exit

Estimate SaaS valuation, unit economics, LTV, CAC, equity dilution, and revenue projections.

6 tools

Unit Economics Calculator

Analyze per-customer profitability: gross margin, CAC payback, LTV, and how to optimize your unit economics.

CAC Calculator

Calculate your Customer Acquisition Cost and payback period. Compare different spend scenarios to find your most efficient acquisition budget.

LTV Calculator

Calculate Customer Lifetime Value (LTV) and LTV:CAC ratio. Compare how different churn rates impact customer value and unit economics.

SaaS Valuation Calculator

Estimate your SaaS company valuation based on ARR, growth rate, and profit margin. See how different multiples and scenarios affect your exit value.

Break-Even Calculator

Calculate when you will break even — with and without monthly revenue growth. See cumulative P&L at 3, 6, 12, and 24 months.

Equity Dilution Calculator

Model how investment rounds dilute founder equity. Calculate post-money valuation, investor ownership, and your remaining shares after funding.
AdSense — home mid

D. Freelance Pricing

Calculate freelance rates, project profitability, affiliate income, course pricing, and email list revenue.

6 tools

Affiliate Income Calculator

Estimate your monthly and annual affiliate income based on traffic, conversion rate, and average commission.

Course Pricing Calculator

Find the optimal course price to hit your income goals, factoring in platform fees. Compare revenue at different price points.

Email List Revenue Calculator

Calculate how much revenue your email list generates per send, per month, and per year based on your funnel metrics.

Freelance Rate Calculator

Calculate your ideal hourly, daily, and monthly rate based on your skill, experience level, and market location.

Hourly vs Fixed Rate Calculator

Calculate the hourly rate, monthly retainer, and project equivalents needed to reach your annual income goal.

Project Profitability Calculator

Calculate profit, effective hourly rate, and profit margin for any freelance project. Compare outcomes at different cost rates.

E. Cost & Efficiency

Figure out meeting costs, employee costs, SaaS pricing, market size, and productivity.

4 tools

SaaS Pricing Planner

Compare flat, tiered, usage-based, and freemium pricing models. Get personalized recommendations based on your product type, audience, and competitor prices.

Employee Cost Calculator

Calculate the true cost of hiring an employee, including benefits, employer taxes, and overhead. Compare costs across salary levels and locations.

Meeting Cost Calculator

Calculate the true dollar cost of meetings based on attendee count, hourly rates, meeting length, and frequency.

Productivity Score Calculator

Rate your solopreneur productivity with a scored assessment. Get actionable tips based on your deep work hours, tool stack, and meeting load.

F. Investment & ROI

Calculate sponsorship rates, time value, freelance taxes, and equity dilution.

3 tools

Freelance Tax Calculator

Estimate your freelance taxes across 5 countries. See your taxable income, quarterly payments, effective tax rate, and monthly take-home pay.

Sponsorship Rate Calculator

Estimate what brands will pay to sponsor your content. Calculate CPM-based rates for podcasts, newsletters, YouTube, and blogs.

Time Value Calculator

Discover what your time is really worth. Calculate your hourly rate and see the dollar cost of meetings, distractions, and daily time waste.
